axis_descriptions.evas_spectre_mismatch: EVAS and Spectre disagree on the same candidate; reduce to L0 conformance.
axis_descriptions.generation: The model did not produce a complete usable artifact.
axis_descriptions.model_behavior: The candidate compiled and ran but failed the functional checker.
axis_descriptions.model_dut_compile: EVAS/static front-end rejected the generated Verilog-A DUT.
axis_descriptions.model_spectre_ahdl_compile: Spectre final judge rejected generated Verilog-A syntax/scope/operator usage.
axis_descriptions.model_spectre_elab_or_topology: Spectre final judge rejected parameter binding, range, or topology.
axis_descriptions.model_spectre_tb_source: Spectre final judge rejected generated testbench source/waveform syntax.
axis_descriptions.model_tb_compile: EVAS/static front-end rejected the generated Spectre testbench.
axis_descriptions.parity: Both sides may pass behavior, but waveform parity needs a conformance/checker-window audit.

score_slices.description: All scored rows. Incomplete generation and runner/output inconclusive rows are counted as failures.
Rows with complete model artifacts and a reliable evaluator judgment. Syntax and behavior failures remain model failures.
Rows that reached the functional checker: strict dual pass plus model_behavior failure rows.

family_summaries.example_evidence: spectre:observed_codes=0 expected_codes=0 stage_bit_mismatches=0 final_concat_mismatches=0 final_code_mismatches=0 residue_mismatches=0 max_res1_err=0.0000 max_res2_err=0.0000 res2_span=0.0000 reversals=0 bounded_failures=0
ERROR (CMI-2194): Vvin: Waveform type must be specified if any waveform

mismatch_rows.root_cause_detail: EVAS and Spectre disagree on the same candidate row.
mismatch_rows.recommended_action: Reduce to a minimal L0 conformance fixture, add an EVAS regression, then rerun affected benchmark rows.
mismatch_rows.conformance_seed_suggestion: minimize vbr1_l1_offset_comparator into L0 syntax/dialect conformance

mismatch_rows.root_cause_detail: Behavior may pass, but waveform-level parity failed or is too close to the checker boundary.
mismatch_rows.recommended_action: Inspect checker windows and waveform metrics; if simulator semantics differ, create an L0 conformance fixture.
mismatch_rows.conformance_seed_suggestion: minimize vbr1_l1_vco_phase_integrator into L0 waveform/checker-window conformance

notes: Spectre remains the final benchmark judge.
Rows with EVAS/Spectre disagreement should become L0 conformance fixtures before being used as model-capability evidence.
Rows where Spectre rejects candidate Verilog-A, source syntax, parameters, or topology are model compatibility failures unless evidence points to runner/license failure.
Report full_strict, valid_candidate, and behavior_ready slices separately so protocol noise is not confused with circuit-behavior ability.
L0 conformance fixtures remain outside scored L1/L2 vaBench denominators.
